name: THE SPRUNKI ROAD TRIP!!
description:
THE SPRUNKI ROAD TRIP!! how neat.

YES, I DID MAKE THE PFP.

(awesome car gaming. not accurate to in-rp car, I just made this a while ago, so it's old and outdated.)

Consists of:

Orange (Oren) Silver (Clukr) Green (Vineria) Red (Raddy) Fun Bot. Gray. Gold (Garnold) brud (Brown) Lime (OWAKCX) Tan (Tunner) Purple (String Durple) Yellow (Simon) Mr. Fun Computer. Jevin (Blue) Wenda (White) Pinki (Pink) Black.

...all in a large limousine-like suv.

NOTE: MR. SUN AND MR. TREE ARE NOT INCLUDED. Mr. Sun would burn the car and everyone alive and Mr. Tree is a... tree.

ANOTHER NOTE: Black is not hostile. I know, it's not canon.. but just shush.

ANOTHER OTHER NOTE: Gray x Wenda... it's here. If you don't like it, leave.

ANOTHER ANOTHER OTHER NOTE: Doesn't include Sky.. i think if you've spent like, a few minutes on the site, you would know that 14 YEAR OLDS ARE NOT ALLOWED!!!! (i forgot this so uh..)

Normal mode.
creator: LukariAdamantite
